>>Number:         15280
>>Category:       kern
>>Synopsis:       kernel panic during FreeBSD install
>>Confidential:   no
>>Severity:       non-critical
>>Priority:       low
>>Responsible:    freebsd-bugs
>>State:          open
>>Quarter:        
>>Keywords:

>>Closed-Date:
>>Last-Modified:
>>Originator:     David Nelson
>>Release:        3.3-STABLE
>>Organization:
>My Company, Inc.
>>Environment:
>N/A - never could get the system operational.
>>Description:
>When the system comes up to the "GUI" install program, the kernel 
>immediately panics.  Fatal trap 12 - page fault while in kernel mode.
>>How-To-Repeat:
>Use a VIA motherboard with an AMD K6-200 processor.
>>Fix:
>Pull the AMD processor out and replaced with Genuine Intel.
>
